name: effect-first
description: A reset local-only experiment for testing repo-local guidance against a baseline prompt

scripts.test: npm run generate:site && vitest run && npm run experiment:verify
scripts.examples:verify: npm --prefix examples/shelley ci && npm --prefix examples/shelley test && npm --prefix examples/claude-code ci && npm --prefix examples/claude-code test && npm --prefix examples/cursor ci && npm --prefix examples/cursor test && npm --prefix examples/codex ci && npm --prefix examples/codex test && npm --prefix examples/copilot ci && npm --prefix examples/copilot test && npm --prefix examples/pi ci && npm --prefix examples/pi test
